creator: avg@FreeBSD.org
text: There are some other things to try.  For example, following pointers in v_nmntvnodes on a chance that they still point to valid vnodes on the original mount list. Also, v_cache_dst.tqh_first may happen to point to struct  namecache that's not been trashed yet, so it might be possible to find some useful bits there like a pointer to a parent directory vnode.
